title: 想いを力に！　天皇賞（春）

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Special Week gave a truly remarkable performance, no? The strength
of her final spurt, the persistence to stay in the front...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I used every ounce of strength I had for this race. And yet, I still... Sniff... I still couldn't catch up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You and I really are alike, Bright... Right down to how bitter defeat
tastes to us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But you know... There will be other races. You can't give up—not now,
not ever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: We'll keep racing... together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Uwaaah! Ryaaan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... You did your best, Bright.

text_block_list.name: Cameraman
text_block_list.text:
Next will be the winning team photo! Special Week, please take your
place in the center.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: R-right!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What, you nervous or something? C'mon, this photo'll last forever, so
ya gotta strike a cool pose!

text_block_list.name: Upbeat Umamusume
text_block_list.text: That's right! Just remember you're a G1 champ!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I know that, it's just... I can feel all their eyes on me. What if I mess
up?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hold your head high. Just approach this photo with the same attitude
you had for this race.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you were so cool out there!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You know... I feel like I took a really big step today.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Towards being the best racer in Japan?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. With the Derby, I was really just focused on how much I wanted
to win. I wasn't thinking about anybody else.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I felt just as motivated going into this race, but... out on the track, I
heard something.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
In that final straightaway, just when I needed it the most, I heard all
of you cheering for me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And then, an image popped into my head. I could see all of you,
smiling and celebrating my win!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I realized I wasn't alone—not on the track or after the race. And that
just made me feel... really good.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's kinda hard to explain, but something tells me that if I want to be
the best in Japan, I need to remember that feeling.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So if I want to make my dream come true—if I really want to be the
best—I need to keep running like I did today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at Special Week now, I remember the young Umamusume
who came to Tokyo with her head in the clouds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her dream, which once sounded so far away, is starting to sound more
and more doable.
choice_data_list:
Keep this up, and you'll be the best racer in
Japan in no time!

Keep this up, and you'll be the best racer in
Japan in no time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Cameraman
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, but could we have the team members squeeze in a bit
more? You're out of frame!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Spe! Face the camera and show it your patented "Best Racer in
Japan" pose!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: P-pose?! L-like... what?!

text_block_list.name: Cameraman
text_block_list.text: Okay, here we go! Three, two, one, cheeeeese!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Best in Japan, here I cooome!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week declares her dream to the heavens.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if in response, the roar of the crowd's cheers crashes down on us,
engulfing the racer so determined to make them proud.
